creator: alex@braske.net
text:
There is a nagios security bug in ping/traceroute utility which is defined here: http://portaudit.freebsd.org/3ebd4cb5-657f-11de-883a-00e0815b8da8.html.

The bug is around for a while (a few weeks atleast), and there is a update in nagios cvs tree, but there haven't been a new version with this patch included yet, so it might be good to atleast add a patch to nagios port which would fix it.

Fix: 

Patches for net-mgmt/nagios and security/vuxml (or atleast a try to do it :P ) is included in: http://dev.fw.lt/freebsd/nagios/
